verses.latin_vulgate: Psalmus David, in consummatione tabernaculi.   Afferte Domino, filii Dei,  afferte Domino filios arietum.
verses.hebrew_masoretic: מִזְמ֗וֹר לְדָ֫וִ֥ד הָב֣וּ לַ֭יהֹוָה בְּנֵ֣י אֵלִ֑ים הָב֥וּ לַ֝יהֹוָ֗ה כָּב֥וֹד וָעֹֽז׃
verses.douay_rheims: A psalm for David, at the finishing of the tabernacle. Bring to the Lord, O ye children of God: bring to the Lord the offspring of rams.
verses.finnish_biblia: Davidin Psalmi. Tuokaat Herralle, te väkevät, tuokaat Herralle kunnia ja väkevyys.
verses.king_james: Give unto the Lord, O ye mighty, give unto the Lord glory and strength.

verses.latin_vulgate: Afferte Domino gloriam et honorem ;  afferte Domino gloriam nomini ejus ;  adorate Dominum in atrio sancto ejus.
verses.hebrew_masoretic: הָב֣וּ לַ֭יהֹוָה כְּב֣וֹד שְׁמ֑וֹ הִשְׁתַּחֲו֥וּ לַ֝יהֹוָ֗ה בְּהַדְרַת־קֹֽדֶשׁ׃
verses.douay_rheims: Bring to the Lord glory and honour: bring to the Lord glory to his name: adore ye the Lord in his holy court.
verses.finnish_biblia: Tuokaat Herralle hänen nimensä kunnia: kumartakaat Herraa pyhässä kaunistuksessa.
verses.king_james: Give unto the Lord the glory due unto his name; worship the Lord in the beauty of holiness.

verses.latin_vulgate: Vox Domini super aquas ;  Deus majestatis intonuit :  Dominus super aquas multas.
verses.hebrew_masoretic: ק֥וֹל יְהֹוָ֗ה עַל־הַ֫מָּ֥יִם אֵֽל־הַכָּב֥וֹד הִרְעִ֑ים יְ֝הֹוָ֗ה עַל־מַ֥יִם רַבִּֽים׃
verses.douay_rheims: The voice of the Lord is upon the waters; the God of majesty hath thundered, The Lord is upon many waters.
verses.finnish_biblia: Herran ääni käy vetten päällä: kunnian Jumala pauhaa, suurten vetten päällä.
verses.king_james: The voice of the Lord is upon the waters: the God of glory thundereth: the Lord is upon many waters.

verses.latin_vulgate: Vox Domini in virtute ;  vox Domini in magnificentia.
verses.douay_rheims: The voice of the Lord is in power; the voice of the Lord in magnificence.
verses.finnish_biblia: Herran ääni käy voimassa: Herran ääni käy suuressa kunniassa.
verses.king_james: The voice of the Lord is powerful; the voice of the Lord is full of majesty.

verses.latin_vulgate: Vox Domini confringentis cedros,  et confringet Dominus cedros Libani :
verses.hebrew_masoretic: ק֣וֹל יְ֭הֹוָה שֹׁבֵ֣ר אֲרָזִ֑ים וַיְשַׁבֵּ֥ר יְ֝הֹוָ֗ה אֶת־אַרְזֵ֥י הַלְּבָנֽוֹן׃
verses.douay_rheims: The voice of the Lord breaketh the cedars: yea, the Lord shall break the cedars of Libanus.
verses.finnish_biblia: Herran ääni särkee sedripuut, ja Herra särkee sedripuut Libanonissa.
verses.king_james: The voice of the Lord breaketh the cedars; yea, the Lord breaketh the cedars of Lebanon.

verses.latin_vulgate: et comminuet eas, tamquam vitulum Libani,  et dilectus quemadmodum filius unicornium.
verses.hebrew_masoretic: וַיַּרְקִידֵ֥ם כְּמוֹ־עֵ֑גֶל לְבָנ֥וֹן וְ֝שִׂרְיֹ֗ן כְּמ֣וֹ בֶן־רְאֵמִֽים׃
verses.douay_rheims: And shall reduce them to pieces, as a calf of Libanus, and as the beloved son of unicorns.
verses.finnish_biblia: Hän hyppäyttää heitä niinkuin vasikan, sekä Libanonin että Sirionin, niinkuin nuoren yksisarvisen.
verses.king_james: He maketh them also to skip like a calf; Lebanon and Sirion like a young unicorn.

verses.douay_rheims: The voice of the Lord divideth the flame of fire:
verses.finnish_biblia: Herran ääni leikkaa niinkuin tulen liekki.
verses.king_james: The voice of the Lord divideth the flames of fire.

verses.latin_vulgate: vox Domini concutientis desertum :  et commovebit Dominus desertum Cades.
verses.hebrew_masoretic: ק֣וֹל יְ֭הֹוָה יָחִ֣יל מִדְבָּ֑ר יָחִ֥יל יְ֝הֹוָ֗ה מִדְבַּ֥ר קָדֵֽשׁ׃
verses.douay_rheims: The voice of the Lord shaketh the desert: and the Lord shall shake the desert of Cades.
verses.finnish_biblia: Herran ääni häälyttää korven, ja Herra liikuttaa Kadeksen korven.
verses.king_james: The voice of the Lord shaketh the wilderness; the Lord shaketh the wilderness of Kadesh.

verses.latin_vulgate: Vox Domini præparantis cervos :  et revelabit condensa,  et in templo ejus omnes dicent gloriam.
verses.hebrew_masoretic: ק֤וֹל יְהֹוָ֨ה ׀ יְחוֹלֵ֣ל אַיָּלוֹת֮ וַֽיֶּחֱשֹׂ֢ף יְעָ֫ר֥וֹת וּבְהֵיכָל֑וֹ כֻּ֝לּ֗וֹ אֹמֵ֥ר כָּבֽוֹד׃
verses.douay_rheims: The voice of the Lord prepareth the stags: and he will discover the thick woods: and in his temple all shall speak his glory.
verses.finnish_biblia: Herran ääni saattaa peurat poikimaan, ja paljastaa metsät: ja hänen templissänsä pitää koko hänen joukkonsa sanoman hänelle kunnian.
verses.king_james: The voice of the Lord maketh the hinds to calve, and discovereth the forests: and in his temple doth every one speak of his glory.

verses.latin_vulgate: Dominus diluvium inhabitare facit,  et sedebit Dominus rex in æternum.
verses.hebrew_masoretic: יְ֭הֹוָה לַמַּבּ֣וּל יָשָׁ֑ב וַיֵּ֥שֶׁב יְ֝הֹוָ֗ה מֶ֣לֶךְ לְעוֹלָֽם׃
verses.douay_rheims: The Lord maketh the flood to dwell: and the Lord shall sit king for ever.
verses.finnish_biblia: Herra istuu vedenpaisumisen päällä: Herra pysyy Kuninkaana ijankaikkisesti.
verses.king_james: The Lord sitteth upon the flood; yea, the Lord sitteth King for ever.

verses.latin_vulgate: Dominus virtutem populo suo dabit ;  Dominus benedicet populo suo in pace.
verses.hebrew_masoretic: יְֽהֹוָ֗ה עֹ֭ז לְעַמּ֣וֹ יִתֵּ֑ן יְהֹוָ֓ה ׀ יְבָרֵ֖ךְ אֶת־עַמּ֣וֹ בַשָּׁלֽוֹם׃ {פ}
verses.douay_rheims: The Lord will give strength to his people: the Lord will bless his people with peace.
verses.finnish_biblia: Herra antaa kansallensa väkevyyden: Herra siunaa kansaansa rauhalla.
verses.king_james: The Lord will give strength unto his people; the Lord will bless his people with peace.
